calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Transfer
Off Calendar Feb-22-2023 Case Transferred

Petition For Recovery Of Trust Property Held By Former Trustee; For Double Damages; For Attorney'S Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Dec-07-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Audrey Gerard, via Zoom, for Marilyn Sylvestri, Petitioner.

The court reminds counsel of its tentative ruling issued by the court in August of this year and acknowledges counsel's filed response. The court advises that it is inclined to dismiss the petition without prejudice for lack of proper venue and to deny the request for transfer. Counsel offers advocacy for this court to order this matter transferred in lieu of dismissing the petition and denying the request to transfer.

After additional discussion, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Nazaruz. Not Reported.
